title: BEM-581 fix decision recorder
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

recorder=scripts/'operator_decision_record_dispatch.py'
rec_lines=[
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'',
'NL = "\\n"',
'STATE_PATH = Path("governance/state/operator_decision_dispatcher_state.json")',
'PICK_PATH = Path("governance/tmp/operator_decision_pick.json")',
'STATUS_PATH = Path("governance/tmp/operator_decision_telegram_status.txt")',
'TRANSPORT_PATH = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")',
'REPORT_PATH = Path("governance/reports/operator_decision_dispatch_result.md")',
'',
'def load_json(path, default):',
'    if path.exists():',
'        try:',
'            return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'        except Exception:',
'            return default',
'    return default',
'',
'def append_jsonl(path, record):',
'    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:',
'        handle.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + NL)',
'',
'state = load_json(STATE_PATH, {})',
'pick = load_json(PICK_PATH, {"picked": False, "send": False})',
'status = STATUS_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore").strip() if STATUS_PATH.exists() else "not_required"',
'if pick.get("picked"):',
'    processed = set(state.get("processed_items", []))',
'    processed.add(pick.get("queue_file"))',
'    state["processed_items"] = sorted(processed)',
'record = {',
'    "record_type": "operator_decision_dispatch",',
'    "cycle_id": "bem581-fix-operator-decision-recorder-syntax",',
'    "queue_file": pick.get("queue_file"),',
'    "decision_id": pick.get("decision_id"),',
'    "send": pick.get("send"),',
'    "reason": pick.get("reason"),',
'    "telegram_status": status if pick.get("send") else "not_sent",',
'    "created_at": "workflow_runtime",',
'    "blocker": None if (not pick.get("send") or status == "sent") else {"code": "OPERATOR_DECISION_TELEGRAM_NOT_SENT", "status": status},',
'}',
'append_jsonl(TRANSPORT_PATH, record)',
'state["last_run"] = record',
'STATE_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'STATE_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + NL, encoding="utf-8")',
'REPORT_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'report_lines = [',
'    "# Operator Decision Dispatch Result",',
'    "",',
'    "Дата: workflow_runtime",',
'    "",',
'    "## Result",',
'    json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),',
'    "",',
'    "## Blocker",',
'    "null" if record.get("blocker") is None else json.dumps(record.get("blocker"), ensure_ascii=False),',
']',
'REPORT_PATH.write_text(NL.join(report_lines) + NL, encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False))',
]
recorder.write_text(NL.join(rec_lines)+NL)

workflow=wfs/'operator-decision-dispatcher.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Operator Decision Dispatcher

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/operator_decision_queue/**'
      - 'scripts/operator_decision_pick.py'
      - 'scripts/operator_decision_record_dispatch.py'
      - '.github/workflows/operator-decision-dispatcher.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: operator-decision-dispatcher
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  dispatch-operator-decision:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check decision scripts
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/operator_decision_pick.py scripts/operator_decision_record_dispatch.py

      - name: Pick structured decision package
        run: python3 scripts/operator_decision_pick.py

      - name: Send operator decision to Telegram
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
        run: |
          if [ ! -s governance/tmp/operator_decision_message.txt ]; then
            echo "not_required" > governance/tmp/operator_decision_telegram_status.txt
          elif [ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" ] || [ -z "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_secret" > governance/tmp/operator_decision_telegram_status.txt
          else
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/operator_decision_telegram_response.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage" --data-urlencode "chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" --data-urlencode "text@governance/tmp/operator_decision_message.txt" --data-urlencode "disable_web_page_preview=true" || echo "000")
            if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then echo "sent" > governance/tmp/operator_decision_telegram_status.txt; else echo "not_sent_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/operator_decision_telegram_status.txt; fi
          fi

      - name: Record dispatch
        run: python3 scripts/operator_decision_record_dispatch.py

      - name: Commit dispatch result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/operator_decision_dispatcher_state.json governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/reports/operator_decision_dispatch_result.md
          git commit -m "BEM-581 operator decision dispatch result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase origin main || git rebase --abort || true
          git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)
''')

report=reports/'bem581_fix_operator_decision_recorder_syntax.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-581 | Fix Operator Decision Recorder Syntax | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 22:01 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\n`operator_decision_record_dispatch.py` rewritten with internal `NL` variable and no broken newline literals. Workflow keeps py_compile gate before runtime.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
record={'record_type':'bem581_fix_operator_decision_recorder_syntax','cycle_id':'bem581-fix-operator-decision-recorder-syntax','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'recorder':str(recorder),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:01 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle:
    handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+NL)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem581_fix_operator_decision_recorder_syntax']={'status':'completed','recorder':str(recorder),'syntax_strategy':'internal_NL_variable','blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:01 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+NL)
proof=proofs/'bem581_fix_operator_decision_recorder_syntax.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-581 PASS: operator_decision_record_dispatch.py syntax fixed with internal NL variable.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(recorder),str(workflow),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Fixed operator_decision_record_dispatch.py SyntaxError with internal NL variable and py_compile workflow gate')
"""
